    Home
    About Us

    Toroidal Transformers

    Our toroidal transformers offer superior performance with lower electromagnetic interference, smaller size, lighter weight, and higher efficiency compared to conventional laminated transformers. Available in standard and custom configurations from 10 VA to 3000 VA.

    Standard Toroidal Transformers

    Our standard range covers 10 VA to 3000 VA with 0–230V AC primary voltage. All units meet international safety standards.

    Standard toroidal transformer specifications
    VA (Nominal)VA (Maximum)Magnetic Path (cm)Approx Size OD × Height (mm)Primary Voltage
    101714.1465 × 250–230V AC
    152214.1465 × 300–230V AC
    253115.7170 × 300–230V AC
    303816.4975 × 300–230V AC
    506218.8590 × 320–230V AC
    758519.6390 × 380–230V AC
    9010319.6390 × 450–230V AC
    15017021.99100 × 500–230V AC

    Custom Transformer Solutions

    We design and manufacture custom transformers based on your requirements. Our engineering team works closely with customers to develop solutions optimised for electrical performance, mechanical constraints, and thermal conditions.

    Frequency & Core Design

    Transformers for 50 Hz to 10 kHz with nanocrystalline and optimised core materials. Winding configuration and size tuned for operating frequency and superior efficiency.

    Thermal & Duty Cycle

    Designs with temperature rise limited to 20°C above ambient. Continuous operation at elevated temperatures up to 200°C and short-time duty ratings available.

    Mechanical & Mounting

    Custom sizes and form factors including open frame, encapsulated, centre potted, captive inserts, DIN rail, PCB mount, and lifting hook configurations.

    Regulation & Accuracy

    Precision designs with 1% or 0.1% accuracy for instrumentation, measurement, control, and high-reliability applications.

    Ruggedised & Protected

    Shock and vibration rated units with potting, impregnation, and tropicalisation. Waterproof transformers rated for 100% relative humidity and harsh environments.

    Electrical Specification

    Custom input tolerances, regulation, temperature rise, ambient ratings, physical dimensions, and load & no-load condition parameters.

    All designs account for input tolerances, regulation, temperature rise, and physical dimensions. Contact us with your requirements.

    Applications

    Our toroidal transformers serve critical roles across diverse industries.

    Hi-FiStudio

    Audio Equipment

    Low-noise, high-fidelity power supplies for amplifiers, mixing consoles, and professional studio gear.

    SafetyIsolation

    Medical Devices

    Safe, isolated power for patient monitoring, imaging systems, and diagnostic equipment meeting safety standards.

    AutomationPLC

    Industrial Controls

    Reliable power conversion for PLCs, motor drives, factory automation systems, and process control equipment.

    MIL-STDAvionics

    Defence & Avionics

    MIL-spec compliant units for airborne electronics, radar, missile guidance systems, and tactical communications.

    Efficient Toroidal Coil Corporation — Custom electromagnetic component manufacturer since 1994. Precision-engineered transformers and potentiometers made in Pune, India.
